memoryArtifacts.headline: Floda socken, Fjällskäfte och Ökna
memoryArtifacts.description:
År 1427 var Fjällskäfte en sätesgård och beboddes av Germund Laurensson (Lars  
Birgerssons ätt) som förde en lilja i vapnet. Hans dotter Birgitta gifte sig med häradshövdingen i Oppunda härad  Matts …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Mattias  Mats Erlandsson  Kagg於1426年出生在瑞典索德曼藍德斯比-雷卡內時，他的父親Erland Mattsson Kagge42歲，母親Elin Kettilbjörnsdotter42歲。他和Birgitta Germundsdotter Lilja至少有12個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1473年在瑞典索德曼藍德斯比-雷卡內洛斯維可享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mattias  Mats Erlandsson  Kagg于1426年出生在瑞典索德曼藍德斯比-雷卡內时，他的父亲Erland Mattsson Kagge42岁，母亲Elin Kettilbjörnsdotter42岁。他和Birgitta Germundsdotter Lilja至少有12个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1473年在瑞典索德曼藍德斯比-雷卡內洛斯維可享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Erlandsson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erland, Erik, Lars, Mats, Alf, Alvar, Bjorn, Helmer, Iver, Nils, Sven.
Americanized form (and a very rare Swedish variant) of Swedish Erlandsson: patronymic from the personal name Erland, from the Old Norse byname Erlandr, meaning ‘foreign, from a foreign country’.
Americanized form of Norwegian and Danish   Erlandsen  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Erlandsen
meanings: Norwegian and Danish: patronymic from the personal name Erland (see Erlandson ).

variants.name: Erland
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from a farm in southwestern Norway so named, from Old Norse elri ‘alder’ + land ‘land’, ‘farm’.
Probably also an American shortened form of Swedish Erlandsson (see Erlandson ).

nameMeanings.name: Kagg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Swiss German and South German Kägi: topographic name from Gehegi, from Middle High German gehage ‘hedge, fence’ (see Kage ).
In some cases possibly also South German (Kägy): variant of Kägi (see 1 above). This surname is very rare in Germany.

variants.name: Kage
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Claus, Hermann, Wilhelm.
topographic name from a shortened form of Middle High German gehage ‘hedge, fence’, a term denoting an enclosed settlement in otherwise wild terrain.

nameMeanings.name: Mattias
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and Norwegian common variant spelling of   Mathias .

nameMeanings.name: Mats
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matthew
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

historicEvents.title: The Engelbrekt Rebellion
historicEvents.description: Engelbrekt Engelbrektsson, a Swedish mine owner and statesman, led a rebellion against Eric of Pomerania, King of the Kalmar Union. Sweden was upset with the Danes' interference with Swedish exports and unjust collection of taxes. The Engelbrekt Rebellion led to the deposing of Eric of Pomerania and the eventual dissolution of the Kalmar Union.

en.lifeSummary: When Mattias  Mats Erlandsson  Kagg was born in 1426, in Husby-Rekarne, Södermanland, Sweden, his father, Erland Mattsson Kagge, was 42 and his mother, Elin Kettilbjörnsdotter, was 42. He had at least 12 sons and 2 daughters with Birgitta Germundsdotter Lilja. He died in 1473, in Rossvik, Husby-Rekarne, Södermanland, Sweden, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mattias  Mats Erlandsson  Kagg est né en 1426, à Husby-Rekarne, Södermanland, Suède, son père, Erland Mattsson Kagge, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Elin Kettilbjörnsdotter, avait 42 ans. Il a eu au moins 12 fils et 2 filles avec Birgitta Germundsdotter Lilja. Il est décédé en 1473, à Rossvik, Husby-Rekarne, Södermanland, Suède, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mattias  Mats Erlandsson  Kagg 1426 in Husby-Rekarne, Södermanland, Schweden geboren wurde, war sein Vater Erland Mattsson Kagge 42 und seine Mutter Elin Kettilbjörnsdotter 42. Er hatte mit Birgitta Germundsdotter Lilja mindestens 12 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1473 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Rossvik, Husby-Rekarne, Södermanland, Schweden.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mattias  Mats Erlandsson  Kagg è nato il nel 1426 nel Husby-Rekarne, Södermanland, Svezia, il suo padre, Erland Mattsson Kagge, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Elin Kettilbjörnsdotter, aveva 42 anni. Lui avuto almeno 12 figli e 2 figlie con Birgitta Germundsdotter Lilja. Morì nel 1473, nel Rossvik, Husby-Rekarne, Södermanland, Svezia, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mattias  Mats Erlandsson  Kaggが1426年にスウェーデンスoデルマンランドハスブイ-レカルンで生まれた時，父Erland Mattsson Kaggeは42歳，母Elin Kettilbjörnsdotterは42歳であった。彼はBirgitta Germundsdotter Liljaとの間に少なくとも12人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1473年にスウェーデンスoデルマンランドハスブイ-レカルンロスヴィクで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mattias  Mats Erlandsson  Kagg(이)가 1426년 스웨덴 스o더먼랜드 후스비-레카른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Erland Mattsson Kagge(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Elin Kettilbjörnsdotter(은)는 42세였다. 그는 Birgitta Germundsdotter Lilja(와)과 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1473년 스웨덴 스o더먼랜드 후스비-레카른 로스빅에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mattias  Mats Erlandsson  Kagg nasceu em 1426, em Husby-Rekarne, Södermanland, Suécia, seu pai, Erland Mattsson Kagge, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Elin Kettilbjörnsdotter, tinha 42 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 12 filhos e 2 filhas com Birgitta Germundsdotter Lilja. Ele faleceu em 1473, em Rossvik, Husby-Rekarne, Södermanland, Suécia, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mattias  Mats Erlandsson  Kagg родился в 1426 г. в местности хусби-рекарн, сoдирманланд, Швеция, его отцу по имени Erland Mattsson Kagge было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Elin Kettilbjörnsdotter, 42. У него было по крайней мере 12 сыновей и 2 дочери от Birgitta Germundsdotter Lilja. Он умер в 1473 г. в местности россвик, хусби-рекарн, сoдирманланд, Швеция в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mattias  Mats Erlandsson  Kagg nació en 1426, en Husby-Rekarne, Södermanland, Suecia, su papá, Erland Mattsson Kagge, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Elin Kettilbjörnsdotter, tenía 42 años. Tuvo por lo menos 12 hijos y 2 hijas con Birgitta Germundsdotter Lilja. Murió en 1473, en Rossvik, Husby-Rekarne, Södermanland, Suecia, a la edad de 47 años.
